mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POWER_RECORD (RECORD_ID, SHOP_ID, RECORD_DATE, CONSUMPTION) VALUES (SEQ_POWER_RECORD.NEXTVAL, #{shopId}, TO_DATE(#{recordDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{consumption})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM POWER_RECORD WHERE SHOP_ID = #{shopId} AND RECORD_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND RECORD_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY RECORD_DATE DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POWER_RECORD
AND RECORD_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND RECORD_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
